g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about market data feeds for equities')
sendPrompt('What news APIs are good for equity trading bots?')
sendPrompt('What social media sources are useful for equity trading sentiment?')
sendPrompt('What technical indicators should an equity momentum bot use?')
sendPrompt('How does an NLP sentiment scoring pipeline work for stock news?')
sendPrompt('How is momentum score calculated in a trading signal pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What tools should the LLM agent have in an agentic trader bot?')
sendPrompt('How does RAG work for a trading bot with financial context?')
sendPrompt('What memory types does a trading agent need?')
sendPrompt('How is position sizing done in an agentic trading bot?')
sendPrompt('What stop-loss strategies should a trading bot use?')
sendPrompt('What guardrails should a trading bot have?')
sendPrompt('What broker APIs can I use for algorithmic equities trading?')
sendPrompt('How does order routing work in an algorithmic trading bot?')
sendPrompt('What is paper trading mode and why does it matter?')
sendPrompt('What should I monitor and log in a trading bot?')
g.text: Trade logs · PnL dashboard · alert system · backtesting harness
